 Detail B
Next is see whether any planets abnormally stays for long
period of time. For example mars in kumbha for more than
six months etc. mercury in Pisces for more than 10 weeks

 Detail c
See whether planets bundle up together. Mostly sun, Venus
and mer will be together. Sometimes then get with
jupiter rahu and saturn.?Concentration of 5 or mo re
planets in 30 degree is a problem.

If this happens in the country 6 8 12 10 and 1st house
there are problems.
This following prediction will clearly highlight the above
said details.
World Prediction for the next 2 months! – by K Gopalakrishnan
Tuesday, 13 May , 2003, 00:00
The whole world will be in a grip of uncertainty and chaos for the next 2 months as
planetary positions doesn’t seem very good. Technically Saturn & Mars are
